provenance.source: Uses redacted synthetic conversation turns to keep adjacent acknowledgement variants from becoming repetitive while preserving direct, non-repeated openings.

messages.text: That makes sense. The configuration is the source of truth here.

cases.answer: Fair point. Start with the source-of-truth configuration, then make the smallest reversible change.

messages.text: Use ASA for exposed outdoor parts.
Why is that the right choice?

cases.answer: Fair point. ASA is the better fit because UV and heat resistance matter more outdoors than ease of printing.
cases.expectedPrefix: Fair point. ASA is the better fit
